debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

failed_attempts:
have h_eq : rewardByCount A R a (n + 1) =ᵐ[𝔓'] fun ω ↦ ω.2 n a :=
    rewardByCount_ae_eq_stream_apply h a (n + 1) n.succ_ne_zero
  have h_vec : (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount A R a i ω) =ᵐ[𝔓']
      fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ if i.1 = 0 then 0 else ω.2 (i.1 - 1) a := by
    rw [ae_all_iff]
    intro ⟨i, hi⟩
    by_cases h0 : i = 0
    · simp [h0, rewardByCount_zero]
    · filter_upwards [rewardByCount_ae_eq_stream_apply h a i h0] with ω hω
      simp [h0, hω]
  refine IndepFun.congr h_eq h_vec ?_
  have h_indep : iIndepFun (fun _ ↦ mα) (fun k ω ↦ ω.2 k a) 𝔓' :=
    iIndepFun_eval_eval_id_streamMeasure ν a
  exact h_indep.indepFun_finset (fun i (hi : i ∈ Iic n) ↦ if i = 0 then 0 else i - 1)
    (fun i hi ↦ by
      dsimp
      split_ifs with h0
      · simp [h0]
      · simp only [mem_Iic] at hi
        omega)
